PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, LAWRENCE $2,800.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,800.00, CLAIM OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF FOR $2752 WAS DISCHARGED BY THE US BANKRUPTCY COURT. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT.
